---
title: "Lilah-Marie Badenhorst"
subtitle: "USF Student"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: profile.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lilahbadenhorst/mywebsite.git
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lilah-marie-badenhorst-2b8071388/
---

A little bit about me and my life.

## Education

University of South Florida \| Tampa,FL \| Aug 2023 - present

## Experience

Publix \| Customer Service Staff \| June 2025 - present

Publix \| Cashier \| Aug 2022 - June 2025

Publix \| Front Service Clerk \| Aug 2021 - Aug 2022
